message:
refactor: Remove duplicate HTTP code, consolidate on metal0 h2.Client

- Delete dead code: http2.zig (22KB), tls.zig (2KB), fetch.zig (8KB)
- Simplify safe_fetch.zig: remove std.http.Client fallback, always use h2
- Stub nativeFetch in legacy native_bindings.zig
- Fix misleading comment in edgebox_run.zig (uses curl, not std.http)
- Fix build.zig: remove duplicate host-frozen option declaration
- Fix freeze/main.zig: mark unused use_host parameter

All HTTP requests now use metal0's h2.Client which provides:
- HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 support
- TLS 1.3 with connection pooling
- HPACK header compression
- gzip decompression
